biometric.legalNotice: Important: Please read this disclosure carefully before proceeding.
biometric.collectionBody: Face templates (faceprints) are biometric identifiers. When you upload your child's photo, we generate a mathematical representation of their facial features.
biometric.purposeBody: These face templates are used solely to create illustrated storybook characters that resemble your child. They are never used for surveillance, identification, or any other purpose.
biometric.storageBody: All biometric data is encrypted with AES-256 at rest and in transit. Face templates are stored separately from photographs in an isolated database with strict access controls.
biometric.retentionBody: Face embeddings are automatically deleted after 12 months of account inactivity. Uploaded photographs are deleted after 30 days. Active accounts retain data only as long as needed for the service.
biometric.deletionBody: As a parent or guardian, you may request deletion of all biometric data at any time through your account settings or by contacting us at privacy@storymagic.app. Deletion is processed within 48 hours.

landing.heroTitle: Personalized Storybooks Where Your Child Is the Hero
landing.heroSubtitle: Create magical, AI-illustrated books featuring your child in minutes. Choose from 10 unique art styles and bring bedtime stories to life.
landing.step1Desc: Upload a photo of your child so we can make them the star of the story.
landing.step2Desc: Tell us about the adventure — the theme, characters, and the lesson your child will learn.
landing.step3Desc: In minutes, receive a beautifully illustrated, personalized storybook ready to read or print.
landing.showcaseSubtitle: Every story deserves its own look. Pick the style that fits your tale.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of parents who turn bedtime into an unforgettable adventure.

about.title: About StoryMagic
about.missionText: We believe every child deserves to see themselves as the hero of their own story. StoryMagic combines cutting-edge AI with beautiful illustration to create personalized storybooks that inspire imagination, build confidence, and strengthen the bond between parents and children.
about.howText: Our platform uses advanced AI models to generate unique stories and illustrations tailored to each child. Parents provide a photo and a story idea, and our technology does the rest — creating a one-of-a-kind book in minutes.
about.valueSafetyDesc: Every image and story is reviewed by our safety systems to ensure age-appropriate, positive content.
about.valueDiversityDesc: We celebrate diversity and ensure children of all backgrounds can see themselves in our stories.
about.valueAccessibilityDesc: Our reader supports dyslexia-friendly fonts, RTL languages, and screen readers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: StoryMagic is committed to protecting the privacy of our users, especially children. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
privacy.collectionText: We collect information you provide when creating an account, adding child profiles, and creating books. This includes names, photos, and story preferences.
privacy.childrenText: We comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 without verifiable parental consent.
privacy.photosText: Photos uploaded to create storybooks are used solely for generating illustrations. They are encrypted at rest and in transit, and are never shared with third parties.
privacy.dataRetentionText: You may delete your account and all associated data at any time. Photos are automatically deleted 30 days after account deletion.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at privacy@storymagic.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using StoryMagic, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.accountText: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. Parents must create and manage accounts on behalf of children under 13.
terms.contentText: You retain ownership of photos you upload. Stories and illustrations generated by our platform are licensed to you for personal, non-commercial use.
terms.prohibitedText: You may not use StoryMagic to create content that is harmful, offensive, or inappropriate for children. We reserve the right to remove any content that violates these terms.
terms.limitationText: StoryMagic is provided as-is. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the service, to the maximum extent permitted by law.
terms.changesText: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification.
terms.contactText: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at legal@storymagic.app.
